table.name: vtiger_payment
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_payment` ( `paymentid` int(11) NOT NULL, `payment_no` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `payment_type` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `amount` decimal(25,8) DEFAULT NULL, `payment_date` date DEFAULT NULL, `transaction_no` varchar(25) DEFAULT NULL, `contactid` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`paymentid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_paymentcf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_paymentcf` ( `paymentid` int(11) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`paymentid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
